content: Noah awakens in their werewolf trap.
Eleanore finds Noah and frees him.
Eleanore begs Noah to leave the village.
Henry finds Noah, excited about their trap.
Noah lies to Henry, saying the trap was not strong enough to hold the werewolf.
Rose confronts Henry about him spending so much time with Noah.
Henry reacts anoyed to Rose's confrontation. He tells her to mind her own business.
Henry returns to Noah, trying to calm him down, assuming the encounter with the werewolf stuck with him.
Rose can't take it anymore and leaves the two alone.
Noah calms down, enjoying Henry's company. They agree to take a break from their hunt.
